kept.text:
$CAT | Caterpillar Q1 Earnings Highlights

🔹 Revenue: $17.4B (Est. $16.49B) 🟢
🔹 EPS: $5.54 (Est. $4.63) 🟢
🔹 Cat Financial Revenue: $947M; UP +10% YoY
🔹 Cat Financial Profit: $144M; UP +11% YoY
🔹 Retail New Business Volume: $3.19B; UP +8% YoY

Cat Financial:
🔹 Revenue: $947M; UP +10% YoY
🔹 Profit Before Income Taxes: $195M; UP +12% YoY
🔹 Profit: $144M; UP +11% YoY
🔹 Retail New Business Volume: $3.19B; UP +8% YoY
🔹 Total Assets: $38.16B

Other Metrics:
🔹 Past Dues: 1.39% vs 1.58% YoY
🔹 Write-Offs, Net of Recoveries: $29M vs $20M YoY
🔹 Allowance for Credit Losses: $283M, or 0.86% of finance receivables

Commentary:
🔸 “Retail new business volume was strong, and our portfolio continues to perform well, with past dues remaining at historically low levels.”

quoted_tweet.text:
$OUST CEO ANGUS PACALA ON LIDAR ADOPTION FOR PHYSICAL AI: “WE AREN’T EVEN IN THE EARLY INNINGS — WE’RE IN THE DUGOUT STRETCHING BEFORE THE GAME” 🤖🦾🔥

Ouster is positioned to be the enabler behind the imminent explosion in autonomous platforms by way of their full-stack sensing and perception suite. 

Autonomous robotics simply do not happen safely or at scale without this technology. 

“Every last company on Earth that makes a machine has an autonomy strategy… Less than 1% of those companies have deployed a product with that autonomy technology.” 

Pacala maintains Ouster’s story is still in its earliest days, even though they’ve been preparing for this moment since 2015.

$OUST is another brilliant example of a business with exceptional vision that built and refined critical technologies well before the end markets were ready for them. 

Now, their moment is finally here, and their opportunity set is enormous. 

Full interview: https://t.co/jxbWRrnBQa

@RoadToAutonomy

tweet.text:
PORTFOLIO UPDATE 4/29
$LUNR   $QBTS   $ORCL   $TSLA   $XYZ   $MU   $CAVA   $CAVA   $ARM   $BE   $IBIT   $GEV   $VRT   $VRT   $CAT   $NBIS   $NBIS

Alright, FOMC & Megas earnings day! I hope you had fun. 

Gameplan remains the same...playing this pullback as an opportunity to get myself into good exposure for a potential re-confirmation of the uptrend. Again, it's not about prediction, but when I see an historical uptrend from the lows, I am a buyer of the first initial pullback by targeting the leading names & groups at their 21dma-structure. It can fail, but with price still above a rising 21dma-structure on QQQ, breadth going sideways and MCO hitting oversold this morning, internals VIX/CS rejected at declining 21dma-structure, I want to keep a bird-view on this trend and engage in this opportunity. 

Mega-caps earnings are coming soft post-market, so this could change that picture, and in which case I played the odds in front of me, and I will manage risk tomorrow. That's the game.

NER at 2.5%, and will allow myself to push up to 3% tomorrow if the setups are there. OH at 8%, and Still have a good +14.38% cushion on this market cycle, allowing me to see this pullback as an opportunity and not as a threat. 

Let's see if we can get stabilization after today's initial momentum, but I like both Credit Spreads and VIX action below their declining 21dma-structure, along with ST breadth that really cooled off in the last few days. Let's see! day by day. 

Cheers HAGN!

Today’s action:
NEW: QBTS. LUNR, ORCL
ADDED: 
TRIMMED: 
OUT: TER, ONDS

tweet.text:
5 out of 9 stocks in my portfolio reported earnings this week.
Every single one beat estimates.

$META. Beat.
$MSFT. Beat.
$CAT. Beat.
$LLY. Beat.
$MA. Beat.
Not one miss. Not one.

$CAT was the standout..
Revenue up 22%. 
EPS came in at $5.54 vs $4.55 expected... Absolutely smashed it. Record backlog too.

$META revenue up 33%. 
$MSFT Azure still growing 40%. These businesses just keep executing.

This is what happens when you only own companies the world can't function without - Earnings season isn't stressful. It's confirmation.

People overcomplicate this part in my opinion, Buy the best businesses on the planet... Let them do what they do.

5 for 5 this week. The system works.
